PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
      PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''Single quoted $var string'')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
      PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''test'')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_START)('"Double ')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)(' quoted ')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)(' string with ')
      PsiPuppetInterpolatedBlockImpl(INTERPOLATED_BLOCK)
        PsiElement(VAR_INTERPOLATION_START)('${')
        PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('hiera')
          PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
            PsiElement(()('(')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"http_port"')
            PsiElement())(')')
        PsiElement(VAR_INTERPOLATION_END)('}')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_END)(' expression "')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
      PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('SINGLE')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_BODY)('  single ${var} quoted $var heredoc with ${hiera("http_port")} expression\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('        SINGLE')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
      PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('"DOUBLE"')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PuppetCompositePsiElementBase(HEREDOC_BODY_QQ)
    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)('  double ')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)(' quoted ')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)(' heredoc with ')
      PsiPuppetInterpolatedBlockImpl(INTERPOLATED_BLOCK)
        PsiElement(VAR_INTERPOLATION_START)('${')
        PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('hiera')
          PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
            PsiElement(()('(')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"http_port"')
            PsiElement())(')')
        PsiElement(VAR_INTERPOLATION_END)('}')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)(' expression\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('        DOUBLE')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
      PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('SINGLE')
      PsiElement())(')')
    PsiElement(,)(',')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
      PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('"DOUBLE"')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_BODY)('  Single ${var} quoted sequentional $var heredoc with ${hiera("http_port")} expression\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('      | SINGLE')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PuppetCompositePsiElementBase(HEREDOC_BODY_QQ)
    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)('  Double ')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)(' quoted sequentional ')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)(' heredoc with ')
      PsiPuppetInterpolatedBlockImpl(INTERPOLATED_BLOCK)
        PsiElement(VAR_INTERPOLATION_START)('${')
        PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('hiera')
          PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
            PsiElement(()('(')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"http_port"')
            PsiElement())(')')
        PsiElement(VAR_INTERPOLATION_END)('}')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)(' expression\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('    | -  DOUBLE')
